tEn: DINO: DETR with Improved DeNoising Anchor Boxes for End-to-End Object Detection
tZh: DINO：通过改进的去噪锚框实现端到端目标检测的DETR
sEn: DINO achieves state-of-the-art end-to-end object detection with improved denoising training, mixed query selection, and look forward twice scheme.
sZh: DINO通过对比去噪训练、混合查询选择和两次前向预测方案，在端到端目标检测中达到最优性能。
absEn: We present DINO (\textbf{D}ETR with \textbf{I}mproved de\textbf{N}oising anch\textbf{O}r boxes), a state-of-the-art end-to-end object detector. % in this paper. DINO improves over previous DETR-like models in performance and efficiency by using a contrastive way for denoising training, a mixed query selection method for anchor initialization, and a look forward twice scheme for box prediction. DINO achieves $49.4$AP in $12$ epochs and $51.3$AP in $24$ epochs on COCO with a ResNet-50 backbone and multi-scale features, yielding a significant improvement of $\textbf{+6.0}$\textbf{AP} and $\textbf{+2.7}$\textbf{AP}, respectively, compared to DN-DETR, the previous best DETR-like model. DINO scales well in both model size and data size. Without bells and whistles, after pre-training on the Objects365 dataset with a SwinL backbone, DINO obtains the best results on both COCO \texttt{val2017} ($\textbf{63.2}$\textbf{AP}) and \texttt{test-dev} (\textbf{$\textbf{63.3}$AP}). Compared to other models on the leaderboard, DINO significantly reduces its model size and pre-training data size while achieving better results. Our code will be available at \url{https://github.com/IDEACVR/DINO}.
absZh: 我们提出了DINO（改进去噪锚框的DETR），一种最先进的端到端目标检测器。DINO通过使用对比方式进行去噪训练、混合查询选择方法进行锚点初始化以及两次前向预测方案进行边界框预测，在性能和效率上优于之前的DETR类模型。在COCO数据集上，使用ResNet-50骨干网络和多尺度特征，DINO在12个epoch中达到49.4 AP，在24个epoch中达到51.3 AP，相比之前最好的DETR类模型DN-DETR，分别显著提升了+6.0 AP和+2.7 AP。DINO在模型大小和数据规模上具有良好的可扩展性。无需额外技巧，在使用SwinL骨干网络在Objects365数据集上预训练后，DINO在COCO val2017（63.2 AP）和test-dev（63.3 AP）上均取得了最佳结果。与排行榜上的其他模型相比，DINO在取得更好结果的同时显著减小了模型大小和预训练数据规模。我们的代码将在https://github.com/IDEACVR/DINO上开源。

contrib.en: Proposes contrastive denoising training with positive and negative samples to improve one-to-one matching.
contrib.zh: 提出对比去噪训练，通过正负样本改善一对一匹配。

contrib.en: Introduces mixed query selection to initialize anchor boxes from encoder features while keeping content queries learnable.
contrib.zh: 引入混合查询选择，从编码器特征初始化锚框，同时保持内容查询可学习。

contrib.en: Develops look forward twice scheme to leverage later layer gradients for earlier layer parameter updates.
contrib.zh: 开发前视两次方案，利用后层梯度更新前层参数。

contrib.en: Achieves 49.4 AP in 12 epochs and 51.3 AP in 24 epochs on COCO with ResNet-50, outperforming prior DETR-like models.
contrib.zh: 在COCO上用ResNet-50在12轮达到49.4 AP，24轮达到51.3 AP，优于先前类DETR模型。

contrib.en: Scales to large backbones and data, achieving 63.2 AP on COCO val2017 and 63.3 AP on test-dev with SwinL and Objects365.
contrib.zh: 扩展到大型骨干网络和数据，使用SwinL和Objects365在COCO val2017上达到63.2 AP，test-dev上达到63.3 AP。

contrib.en: First end-to-end Transformer detector to surpass SOTA on COCO leaderboard with reduced model and data size.
contrib.zh: 首个在COCO排行榜上超越SOTA的端到端Transformer检测器，且模型和数据规模更小。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to COCO dataset; generalization to other domains not verified.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于COCO数据集，未验证对其他领域的泛化性。

limits.en: Performance depends on pre-training on Objects365; may not hold without large-scale pre-training.
limits.zh: 性能依赖于Objects365预训练，无大规模预训练时可能不成立。

limits.en: Contrastive denoising requires tuning noise scales λ1 and λ2; sensitivity not fully explored.
limits.zh: 对比去噪需要调整噪声尺度λ1和λ2，敏感性未充分探索。

limits.en: Look forward twice adds computational overhead due to extra gradient flow.
limits.zh: 前视两次因额外梯度流增加计算开销。

limits.en: Mixed query selection assumes encoder features provide reliable spatial priors; may fail with poor encoder.
limits.zh: 混合查询选择假设编码器特征提供可靠空间先验，编码器差时可能失效。

items.en: We present DINO (DETR with Improved deNoising anchOr boxes), a state-of-the-art end-to-end object detector. DINO improves over previous DETR-like models in performance and efficiency by using a contrastive way for denoising training, a mixed query selection method for anchor initialization, and a look forward twice scheme for box prediction. DINO achieves 49.449.449.4AP in 121212 epochs and 51.351.351.3AP in 242424 epochs on COCO with a ResNet-50 backbone and multi-scale features, yielding a significant improvement of +6.0AP and +2.7AP, respectively, compared to DN-DETR, the previous best DETR-like model. DINO scales well in both model size and data size. Without bells and whistles, after pre-training on the Objects365 dataset with a SwinL backbone, DINO obtains the best results on both COCO val2017 (63.2AP) and test-dev (63.3AP). Compared to other models on the leaderboard, DINO significantly reduces its model size and pre-training data size while achieving better results. Our code will be available at https://github.com/IDEACVR/DINO.
items.zh: 我们提出了DINO（DETR with Improved deNoising anchOr boxes），一种最先进的端到端目标检测器。DINO通过使用对比去噪训练、混合查询选择方法进行锚点初始化，以及前向两次方案进行框预测，在性能和效率上优于之前的DETR类模型。在COCO上，使用ResNet-50骨干网络和多尺度特征，DINO在12个epoch中达到49.4 AP，在24个epoch中达到51.3 AP，相比之前最好的DETR类模型DN-DETR，分别显著提升了+6.0 AP和+2.7 AP。DINO在模型大小和数据规模上都具有良好的可扩展性。无需额外技巧，在使用SwinL骨干网络在Objects365数据集上预训练后，DINO在COCO val2017（63.2 AP）和test-dev（63.3 AP）上均取得了最佳结果。与排行榜上的其他模型相比，DINO在取得更好结果的同时，显著减小了模型大小和预训练数据规模。我们的代码将在https://github.com/IDEACVR/DINO上提供。

items.capEn: Figure 1: AP on COCO compared with other detection models. (a) Comparison to models with a ResNet-50 backbone w.r.t. training epochs. Models marked with DC5 use a dilated larger resolution feature map. Other models use multi-scale features. (b) Comparison to SOTA models w.r.t. pre-training data size and model size. SOTA models are from the COCO test-dev leaderboard. In the legend we list the backbone pre-training data size (first number) and detection pre-training data size (second number). ∗* means the data size is not disclosed.
items.capZh: 图1：COCO上与其他检测模型的AP比较。(a) 与使用ResNet-50骨干网络的模型在训练epoch方面的比较。标记为DC5的模型使用扩张的更大分辨率特征图。其他模型使用多尺度特征。(b) 与SOTA模型在预训练数据规模和模型规模方面的比较。SOTA模型来自COCO test-dev排行榜。图例中列出了骨干网络预训练数据规模（第一个数字）和检测预训练数据规模（第二个数字）。∗表示数据规模未公开。

items.en: Object detection is a fundamental task in computer vision. Remarkable progress has been accomplished by classical convolution-based object detection algorithms [31, 35, 19, 2, 12]. Despite that such algorithms normally include hand-designed components like anchor generation and non-maximum suppression (NMS), they yield the best detection models such as DyHead [7], Swin [23] and SwinV2 [22] with HTC++ [4], as evidenced on the COCO test-dev leaderboard [1].
items.zh: 目标检测是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。经典的基于卷积的目标检测算法[31, 35, 19, 2, 12]取得了显著进展。尽管这些算法通常包含手工设计的组件，如锚点生成和非极大值抑制（NMS），但它们产生了最佳的检测模型，如DyHead [7]、Swin [23]和SwinV2 [22]与HTC++ [4]的结合，这在COCO test-dev排行榜[1]上得到了证明。

items.en: In contrast to classical detection algorithms, DETR [3] is a novel Transformer-based detection algorithm. It eliminates the need of hand-designed components and achieves comparable performance with optimized classical detectors like Faster RCNN [31]. Different from previous detectors, DETR models object detection as a set prediction task and assigns labels by bipartite graph matching. It leverages learnable queries to probe the existence of objects and combine features from an image feature map, which behaves like soft ROI pooling [21].
items.zh: 与经典检测算法相比，DETR [3]是一种新颖的基于Transformer的检测算法。它消除了手工设计组件的需要，并实现了与优化的经典检测器（如Faster RCNN [31]）相当的性能。与之前的检测器不同，DETR将目标检测建模为集合预测任务，并通过二分图匹配分配标签。它利用可学习的查询来探测目标的存在，并从图像特征图中组合特征，其行为类似于软ROI池化[21]。

items.en: Despite its promising performance, the training convergence of DETR is slow and the meaning of queries is unclear. To address such problems, many methods have been proposed, such as introducing deformable attention [41], decoupling positional and content information [25], providing spatial priors [11, 39, 37], etc. Recently, DAB-DETR [21] proposes to formulate DETR queries as dynamic anchor boxes (DAB), which bridges the gap between classical anchor-based detectors and DETR-like ones. DN-DETR [17] further solves the instability of bipartite matching by introducing a denoising (DN) technique. The combination of DAB and DN makes DETR-like models competitive with classical detectors on both training efficiency and inference performance.
items.zh: 尽管DETR性能有前景，但其训练收敛速度慢且查询的含义不明确。为了解决这些问题，人们提出了许多方法，例如引入可变形注意力[41]、解耦位置和内容信息[25]、提供空间先验[11, 39, 37]等。最近，DAB-DETR [21]提出将DETR查询公式化为动态锚框（DAB），这弥合了经典基于锚点的检测器与DETR类检测器之间的差距。DN-DETR [17]通过引入去噪（DN）技术进一步解决了二分图匹配的不稳定性。DAB和DN的结合使得DETR类模型在训练效率和推理性能上与经典检测器具有竞争力。

items.en: The best detection models nowadays are based on improved classical detectors like DyHead [8] and HTC [4]. For example, the best result presented in SwinV2 [22] was trained with the HTC++ [4, 23] framework. Two main reasons contribute to the phenomenon: 1) Previous DETR-like models are inferior to the improved classical detectors. Most classical detectors have been well studied and highly optimized, leading to a better performance compared with the newly developed DETR-like models. For instance, the best performing DETR-like models nowadays are still under 505050 AP on COCO. 2) The scalability of DETR-like models has not been well studied. There is no reported result about how DETR-like models perform when scaling to a large backbone and a large-scale data set. We aim to address both concerns in this paper.
items.zh: 目前最好的检测模型基于改进的经典检测器，如DyHead [8]和HTC [4]。例如，SwinV2 [22]中呈现的最佳结果是使用HTC++ [4, 23]框架训练的。造成这种现象的两个主要原因是：1) 之前的DETR类模型不如改进的经典检测器。大多数经典检测器已经得到充分研究和高度优化，因此与新开发的DETR类模型相比性能更好。例如，目前性能最好的DETR类模型在COCO上的AP仍低于50。2) DETR类模型的可扩展性尚未得到充分研究。关于DETR类模型在扩展到大型骨干网络和大规模数据集时的表现，尚无报告结果。本文旨在解决这两个问题。

items.en: Specifically, by improving the denoising training, query initialization, and box prediction, we design a new DETR-like model based on DN-DETR [17], DAB-DETR [21], and Deformable DETR [41]. We name our model as DINO (DETR with Improved deNoising anchOr box). As shown in Fig. 1, the comparison on COCO shows the superior performance of DINO. In particular, DINO demonstrates a great scalability, setting a new record of 63.363.363.3 AP on the COCO test-dev leaderboard [1]
items.zh: 具体来说，通过改进去噪训练、查询初始化和框预测，我们基于DN-DETR [17]、DAB-DETR [21]和Deformable DETR [41]设计了一种新的DETR类模型。我们将模型命名为DINO（DETR with Improved deNoising anchOr box）。如图1所示，在COCO上的比较显示了DINO的优越性能。特别是，DINO展示了出色的可扩展性，在COCO test-dev排行榜[1]上创下了63.3 AP的新纪录。

items.en: As a DETR-like model, DINO contains a backbone, a multi-layer Transformer encoder, a multi-layer Transformer decoder, and multiple prediction heads. Following DAB-DETR [21], we formulate queries in decoder as dynamic anchor boxes and refine them step-by-step across decoder layers. Following DN-DETR [17], we add ground truth labels and boxes with noises into the Transformer decoder layers to help stabilize bipartite matching during training. We also adopt deformable attention [41] for its computational efficiency. Moreover, we propose three new methods as follows. First, to improve the one-to-one matching, we propose a contrastive denoising training by adding both positive and negative samples of the same ground truth at the same time. After adding two different noises to the same ground truth box, we mark the box with a smaller noise as positive and the other as negative. The contrastive denoising training helps the model to avoid duplicate outputs of the same target. Second, the dynamic anchor box formulation of queries links DETR-like models with classical two-stage models. Hence we propose a mixed query selection method, which helps better initialize the queries. We select initial anchor boxes as positional queries from the output of the encoder, similar to [41, 39]. However, we leave the content queries learnable as before, encouraging the first decoder layer to focus on the spatial prior. Third, to leverage the refined box information from later layers to help optimize the parameters of their adjacent early layers, we propose a new look forward twice scheme to correct the updated parameters with gradients from later layers.
items.zh: 作为一种DETR类模型，DINO包含一个骨干网络、一个多层Transformer编码器、一个多层Transformer解码器和多个预测头。遵循DAB-DETR [21]，我们将解码器中的查询公式化为动态锚框，并在解码器层中逐步细化。遵循DN-DETR [17]，我们将带有噪声的真实标签和框添加到Transformer解码器层中，以帮助在训练期间稳定二分图匹配。我们还采用了可变形注意力[41]以提高计算效率。此外，我们提出了以下三种新方法。首先，为了改进一对一匹配，我们提出了一种对比去噪训练，同时添加同一真实框的正样本和负样本。在对同一真实框添加两种不同的噪声后，我们将噪声较小的框标记为正样本，另一个标记为负样本。对比去噪训练有助于模型避免对同一目标产生重复输出。其次，查询的动态锚框公式将DETR类模型与经典的两阶段模型联系起来。因此，我们提出了一种混合查询选择方法，有助于更好地初始化查询。我们从编码器的输出中选择初始锚框作为位置查询，类似于[41, 39]。然而，我们保持内容查询像以前一样可学习，鼓励第一解码器层关注空间先验。第三，为了利用来自后面层的细化框信息来帮助优化其相邻早期层的参数，我们提出了一种新的前向两次方案，用后面层的梯度来校正更新的参数。

items.en: We validate the effectiveness of DINO with extensive experiments on the COCO [20] detection benchmarks. As shown in Fig. 1, DINO achieves 49.449.449.4AP in 121212 epochs and 51.351.351.3AP in 242424 epochs with ResNet-50 and multi-scale features, yielding a significant improvement of +6.0AP and +2.7AP, respectively, compared to the previous best DETR-like model. In addition, DINO scales well in both model size and data size. After pre-training on the Objects365 [33] data set with a SwinL [23] backbone, DINO achieves the best results on both COCO val2017 (63.2AP) and test-dev (63.3AP) benchmarks, as shown in Table 3. Compared to other models on the leaderboard [1], we reduce the model size to 1/15 compared to SwinV2-G [22]. Compared to Florence [40], we reduce the pre-training detection dataset to 1/5 and backbone pre-training dataset to 1/60 while achieving better results.
items.zh: 我们通过在COCO [20]检测基准上的大量实验验证了DINO的有效性。如图1所示，使用ResNet-50和多尺度特征，DINO在12个epoch中达到49.4 AP，在24个epoch中达到51.3 AP，与之前最好的DETR类模型相比，分别显著提升了+6.0 AP和+2.7 AP。此外，DINO在模型大小和数据规模上都具有良好的可扩展性。在使用SwinL [23]骨干网络在Objects365 [33]数据集上预训练后，DINO在COCO val2017（63.2 AP）和test-dev（63.3 AP）基准上均取得了最佳结果，如表3所示。与排行榜[1]上的其他模型相比，我们将模型大小减小到SwinV2-G [22]的1/15。与Florence [40]相比，我们将预训练检测数据集减小到1/5，骨干网络预训练数据集减小到1/60，同时取得了更好的结果。

items.en: We summarize our contributions as follows.
items.zh: 我们将贡献总结如下。

items.en: We design a new end-to-end DETR-like object detector with several novel techniques, including contrastive DN training, mixed query selection, and look forward twice for different parts of the DINO model.
items.zh: 我们设计了一种新的端到端DETR类目标检测器，其中包含几种新颖技术，包括对比DN训练、混合查询选择以及针对DINO模型不同部分的前向两次。

items.en: We conduct intensive ablation studies to validate the effectiveness of different design choices in DINO. As a result, DINO achieves 49.449.449.4AP in 121212 epochs and 51.351.351.3AP in 242424 epochs with ResNet-50 and multi-scale features, significantly outperforming the previous best DETR-like models. In particular, DINO trained in 121212 epochs shows a more significant improvement on small objects, yielding an improvement of +7.5AP.
items.zh: 我们进行了大量的消融研究，以验证DINO中不同设计选择的有效性。结果，使用ResNet-50和多尺度特征，DINO在12个epoch中达到49.4 AP，在24个epoch中达到51.3 AP，显著优于之前最好的DETR类模型。特别是，在12个epoch中训练的DINO在小目标上表现出更显著的改进，提升了+7.5 AP。

items.en: We show that, without bells and whistles, DINO can achieve the best performance on public benchmarks. After pre-training on the Objects365 [33] dataset with a SwinL [23] backbone, DINO achieves the best results on both COCO val2017 (63.2AP) and test-dev (63.3AP) benchmarks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that an end-to-end Transformer detector outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) models on the COCO leaderboard [1].
items.zh: 我们表明，无需额外技巧，DINO可以在公共基准上取得最佳性能。在使用SwinL [23]骨干网络在Objects365 [33]数据集上预训练后，DINO在COCO val2017（63.2 AP）和test-dev（63.3 AP）基准上均取得了最佳结果。据我们所知，这是端到端Transformer检测器首次在COCO排行榜[1]上超越最先进的（SOTA）模型。

items.en: Early convolution-based object detectors are either two-stage or one-stage models, based on hand-crafted anchors or reference points. Two-stage models [30, 13] usually use an region proposal network (RPN) [30] to propose potential boxes, which are then refined in the second stage. One-stage models such as YOLO v2 [28] and YOLO v3 [29] directly output offsets relative to predefined anchors. Recently, some convolution-based models such as HTC++ [4] and Dyhead [7] have achieved top performance on the COCO 2017 dataset [20]. The performance of convolution-based models, however, relies on the way they generate anchors. Moreover, they need hand-designed components like NMS to remove duplicate boxes, and hence cannot perform end-to-end optimization.
items.zh: 早期的基于卷积的目标检测器要么是两阶段模型，要么是单阶段模型，基于手工设计的锚点或参考点。两阶段模型[30, 13]通常使用区域提议网络（RPN）[30]来提议潜在的框，然后在第二阶段进行细化。单阶段模型如YOLO v2 [28]和YOLO v3 [29]直接输出相对于预定义锚点的偏移量。最近，一些基于卷积的模型如HTC++ [4]和Dyhead [7]在COCO 2017数据集[20]上取得了顶级性能。然而，基于卷积的模型的性能依赖于它们生成锚点的方式。此外，它们需要像NMS这样的手工设计组件来去除重复框，因此无法进行端到端优化。

items.en: Carion et al. [3] proposed a Transformer-based end-to-end object detector named DETR (DEtection TRansformer) without using hand-designed components like anchor design and NMS. Many follow-up papers have attempted to address the slow training convergence issue of DETR introduced by decoder cross-attention. For instance, Sun et al. [34] designed an encoder-only DETR without using a decoder. Dai et al. [7] proposed a dynamic decoder to focus on important regions from multiple feature levels.
items.zh: Carion等人[3]提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端目标检测器，名为DETR（DEtection TRansformer），无需使用锚点设计和NMS等手工设计组件。许多后续论文试图解决由解码器交叉注意力引入的DETR训练收敛缓慢的问题。例如，Sun等人[34]设计了一种仅编码器的DETR，不使用解码器。Dai等人[7]提出了一种动态解码器，专注于来自多个特征层级的重要区域。

items.en: Another line of works is towards a deeper understanding of decoder queries in DETR. Many papers associate queries with spatial position from different perspectives. Deformable DETR [41] predicts 222D anchor points and designs a deformable attention module that only attends to certain sampling points around a reference point. Efficient DETR [39] selects top K positions from encoder’s dense prediction to enhance decoder queries. DAB-DETR [21] further extends 222D anchor points to 444D anchor box coordinates to represent queries and dynamically update boxes in each decoder layer. Recently, DN-DETR [17] introduces a denoising training method to speed up DETR training. It feeds noise-added ground-truth labels and boxes into the decoder and trains the model to reconstruct the original ones. Our work of DINO in this paper is based on DAB-DETR and DN-DETR, and also adopts deformable attention for its computational efficiency.
items.zh: 另一条工作线是深入理解DETR中的解码器查询。许多论文从不同角度将查询与空间位置关联起来。Deformable DETR [41]预测2D锚点，并设计了一种可变形注意力模块，仅关注参考点周围的某些采样点。Efficient DETR [39]从编码器的密集预测中选择前K个位置来增强解码器查询。DAB-DETR [21]进一步将2D锚点扩展到4D锚框坐标来表示查询，并在每个解码器层中动态更新框。最近，DN-DETR [17]引入了一种去噪训练方法来加速DETR训练。它将添加噪声的真实标签和框输入解码器，并训练模型重建原始标签和框。本文中我们的DINO工作基于DAB-DETR和DN-DETR，并采用可变形注意力以提高计算效率。

full.secZh: 2.3 大规模预训练用于目标检测

items.en: Large-scale pre-training have had a big impact on both natural language processing [10] and computer vision [27]. The best performance detectors nowadays are mostly achieved with large backbones pre-trained on large-scale data. For example, Swin V2 [22] extends its backbone size to 3.03.03.0 Billion parameters and pre-trains its models with 707070M privately collected images. Florence [40] first pre-trains its backbone with 900900900M privately curated image-text pairs and then pre-trains its detector with 999M images with annotated or pseudo boxes. In contrast, DINO achieves the SOTA result with a publicly available SwinL [23] backbone and a public dataset Objects365 [33] (1.7M annotated images) only.
items.zh: 大规模预训练对自然语言处理[10]和计算机视觉[27]都产生了重大影响。目前性能最好的检测器大多使用在大规模数据上预训练的大型骨干网络。例如，Swin V2 [22]将其骨干网络规模扩展到30亿参数，并使用7000万张私人收集的图像预训练其模型。Florence [40]首先使用9亿张私人策划的图像-文本对预训练其骨干网络，然后使用900万张带有标注或伪框的图像预训练其检测器。相比之下，DINO仅使用公开可用的SwinL [23]骨干网络和公共数据集Objects365 [33]（170万张标注图像）就取得了SOTA结果。

full.sec: 3 DINO: DETR with Improved DeNoising Anchor Boxes

items.capEn: Figure 2: The framework of our proposed DINO model. Our improvements are mainly in the Transformer encoder and decoder. The top-K encoder features in the last layer are selected to initialize the positional queries for the Transformer decoder, whereas the content queries are kept as learnable parameters. Our decoder also contains a Contrastive DeNoising (CDN) part with both positive and negative samples.
items.capZh: 图2：我们提出的DINO模型框架。我们的改进主要在Transformer编码器和解码器中。最后一层编码器的前K个特征被选择用于初始化Transformer解码器的位置查询，而内容查询保持为可学习参数。我们的解码器还包含一个对比去噪（CDN）部分，包含正样本和负样本。

items.en: As studied in Conditional DETR [25] and DAB-DETR [21], it becomes clear that queries in DETR [3] are formed by two parts: a positional part and a content part, which are referred to as positional queries and content queries in this paper. DAB-DETR [21] explicitly formulates each positional query in DETR as a 4D anchor box (x,y,w,h)𝑥𝑦𝑤ℎ(x,y,w,h), where x𝑥x and y𝑦y are the center coordinates of the box and w𝑤w and hℎh correspond to its width and height. Such an explicit anchor box formulation makes it easy to dynamically refine anchor boxes layer by layer in the decoder.
items.zh: 正如Conditional DETR [25]和DAB-DETR [21]所研究的，DETR [3]中的查询由两部分组成：位置部分和内容部分，本文中分别称为位置查询和内容查询。DAB-DETR [21]将DETR中的每个位置查询明确公式化为一个4D锚框(x,y,w,h)，其中x和y是框的中心坐标，w和h对应其宽度和高度。这种显式的锚框公式使得在解码器中逐层动态细化锚框变得容易。

items.en: DN-DETR [17] introduces a denoising (DN) training method to accelerate the training convergence of DETR-like models. It shows that the slow convergence problem in DETR is caused by the instability of bipartite matching. To mitigate this problem, DN-DETR proposes to additionally feed noised ground-truth (GT) labels and boxes into the Transformer decoder and train the model to reconstruct the ground-truth ones. The added noise (Δ​x,Δ​y,Δ​w,Δ​h)Δ𝑥Δ𝑦Δ𝑤Δℎ(\Delta x,\Delta y,\Delta w,\Delta h) is constrained by |Δ​x|<λ​w2Δ𝑥𝜆𝑤2|\Delta x|<\frac{\lambda w}{2}, |Δ​y|<λ​h2Δ𝑦𝜆ℎ2|\Delta y|<\frac{\lambda h}{2}, |Δ​w|<λ​wΔ𝑤𝜆𝑤|\Delta w|<\lambda w, and |Δ​y|<λ​hΔ𝑦𝜆ℎ|\Delta y|<\lambda h, where (x,y,w,h)𝑥𝑦𝑤ℎ(x,y,w,h) denotes a GT box and λ𝜆\lambda111The DN-DETR paper [17] uses λ1subscript𝜆1\lambda_{1} and λ2subscript𝜆2\lambda_{2} to denote noise scales of center shifting and box scaling, but sets λ1=λ2subscript𝜆1subscript𝜆2\lambda_{1}=\lambda_{2}. In this paper, we use λ𝜆\lambda in place of λ1​and​λ2subscript𝜆1andsubscript𝜆2\lambda_{1}\text{and}\lambda_{2} for simplicity. is a hyper-parameter to control the scale of noise. Since DN-DETR follows DAB-DETR to view decoder queries as anchors, a noised GT box can be viewed as a special anchor with a GT box nearby as λ𝜆\lambda is usually small. In addition to the orginal DETR queries, DN-DETR adds a DN part which feeds noised GT labels and boxes into the decoder to provide an auxiliary DN loss. The DN loss effectively stabilizes and speeds up the DETR training and can be plugged into any DETR-like models.
items.zh: DN-DETR [17]引入了一种去噪（DN）训练方法来加速DETR类模型的训练收敛。它表明DETR中收敛缓慢的问题是由二分图匹配的不稳定性引起的。为了缓解这个问题，DN-DETR提出将添加噪声的真实（GT）标签和框额外输入Transformer解码器，并训练模型重建真实标签和框。添加的噪声(Δx,Δy,Δw,Δh)受限于|Δx|<λw/2, |Δy|<λh/2, |Δw|<λw, 和|Δy|<λh，其中(x,y,w,h)表示真实框，λ是控制噪声尺度的超参数。由于DN-DETR遵循DAB-DETR将解码器查询视为锚点，因此添加噪声的真实框可以视为一个特殊的锚点，其附近有一个真实框，因为λ通常很小。除了原始的DETR查询外，DN-DETR还添加了一个DN部分，将添加噪声的真实标签和框输入解码器，以提供辅助的DN损失。DN损失有效地稳定并加速了DETR训练，并且可以插入任何DETR类模型中。

items.en: Deformable DETR [41] is another early work to speed up the convergence of DETR. To compute deformable attention, it introduces the concept of reference point so that deformable attention can attend to a small set of key sampling points around a reference. The reference point concept makes it possible to develop several techniques to further improve the DETR performance. The first technique is query selection222Also named as “two-stage” in the Deformable DETR paper. As the “two-stage” name might confuse readers with classical detectors, we use the term “query selection” instead in our paper., which selects features and reference boxes from the encoder as inputs to the decoder directly. The second technique is iterative bounding box refinement with a careful gradient detachment design between two decoder layers. We call this gradient detachment technique “look forward once” in our paper.
items.zh: Deformable DETR [41] 是另一项加速 DETR 收敛的早期工作。为了计算可变形注意力，它引入了参考点的概念，使得可变形注意力可以关注参考点周围的一小组关键采样点。参考点的概念使得开发多种技术以进一步提高 DETR 性能成为可能。第一种技术是查询选择（在 Deformable DETR 论文中也称为“两阶段”）。由于“两阶段”名称可能使读者与经典检测器混淆，我们在论文中使用术语“查询选择”代替。该技术直接从编码器中选择特征和参考框作为解码器的输入。第二种技术是迭代边界框细化，并在两个解码器层之间进行仔细的梯度分离设计。我们在论文中将这种梯度分离技术称为“一次前向”。

items.en: Following DAB-DETR and DN-DETR, DINO formulates the positional queries as dynamic anchor boxes and is trained with an extra DN loss. Note that DN-DETR also adopts several techniques from Deformable DETR to achieve a better performance, including its deformable attention mechanism and “look forward once” implementation in layer parameter update. DINO further adopts the query selection idea from Deformable DETR to better initialize the positional queries. Built upon this strong baseline, DINO introduces three novel methods to further improve the detection performance, which will be described in Sec. 3.3, Sec. 3.4, and Sec. 3.5, respectively.
items.zh: 继 DAB-DETR 和 DN-DETR 之后，DINO 将位置查询公式化为动态锚框，并使用额外的 DN 损失进行训练。注意，DN-DETR 也采用了 Deformable DETR 的多种技术以获得更好的性能，包括其可变形注意力机制和层参数更新中的“一次前向”实现。DINO 进一步采用了 Deformable DETR 的查询选择思想，以更好地初始化位置查询。基于这一强基线，DINO 引入了三种新方法以进一步提高检测性能，这些方法将分别在 3.3 节、3.4 节和 3.5 节中描述。

items.en: As a DETR-like model, DINO is an end-to-end architecture which contains a backbone, a multi-layer Transformer [36] encoder, a multi-layer Transformer decoder, and multiple prediction heads. The overall pipeline is shown in Fig. 2. Given an image, we extract multi-scale features with backbones like ResNet [14] or Swin Transformer [23], and then feed them into the Transformer encoder with corresponding positional embeddings. After feature enhancement with the encoder layers, we propose a new mixed query selection strategy to initialize anchors as positional queries for the decoder. Note that this strategy does not initialize content queries but leaves them learnable. More details of mixed query selection are available in Sec. 3.4. With the initialized anchors and the learnable content queries, we use the deformable attention [41] to combine the features of the encoder outputs and update the queries layer-by-layer. The final outputs are formed with refined anchor boxes and classification results predicted by refined content features. As in DN-DETR [17], we have an extra DN branch to perform denoising training. Beyond the standard DN method, we propose a new contrastive denoising training approach by taking into account hard negative samples, which will be presented in Sec. 3.3. To fully leverage the refined box information from later layers to help optimize the parameters of their adjacent early layer, a novel look forward twice method is proposed to pass gradients between adjacent layers, which will be described in Sec. 3.5.
items.zh: 作为一个类似 DETR 的模型，DINO 是一种端到端架构，包含主干网络、多层 Transformer [36] 编码器、多层 Transformer 解码器和多个预测头。整体流程如图 2 所示。给定一张图像，我们使用 ResNet [14] 或 Swin Transformer [23] 等主干网络提取多尺度特征，然后将其与相应的位置嵌入一起输入到 Transformer 编码器中。经过编码器层的特征增强后，我们提出了一种新的混合查询选择策略，以初始化锚框作为解码器的位置查询。注意，该策略不初始化内容查询，而是使其可学习。混合查询选择的更多细节见 3.4 节。利用初始化的锚框和可学习的内容查询，我们使用可变形注意力 [41] 结合编码器输出的特征，并逐层更新查询。最终输出由细化的锚框和通过细化内容特征预测的分类结果组成。与 DN-DETR [17] 一样，我们有一个额外的 DN 分支来执行去噪训练。除了标准的 DN 方法，我们提出了一种新的对比去噪训练方法，通过考虑难负样本，这将在 3.3 节中介绍。为了充分利用来自后层的细化框信息来帮助优化相邻前层的参数，我们提出了一种新颖的两次前向方法，以在相邻层之间传递梯度，这将在 3.5 节中描述。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The structure of CDN group and a demonstration of positive and negative examples. Although both positive and negative examples are 444D anchors that can be represented as points in 444D space, we illustrate them as points in 222D space on concentric squares for simplicity. Assuming the square center is a GT box, points inside the inner square are regarded as a positive example and points between the inner square and the outer square are viewed as negative examples.
items.capZh: 图 3：CDN 组的结构以及正负样本的演示。尽管正负样本都是可以表示为 4D 空间中点的 4D 锚框，但为了简单起见，我们将其表示为同心正方形上的 2D 空间中的点。假设正方形中心是一个 GT 框，内正方形内的点被视为正样本，内正方形和外正方形之间的点被视为负样本。

items.en: DN-DETR is very effective in stabilizing training and accelerating convergence. With the help of DN queries, it learns to make predictions based on anchors which have GT boxes nearby. However, it lacks a capability of predicting “no object” for anchors with no object nearby. To address this issue, we propose a Contrastive DeNoising (CDN) approach to rejecting useless anchors.
items.zh: DN-DETR 在稳定训练和加速收敛方面非常有效。借助 DN 查询，它学会了基于附近有 GT 框的锚框进行预测。然而，它缺乏对附近没有物体的锚框预测“无物体”的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种对比去噪（CDN）方法来拒绝无用的锚框。

items.en: Implementation: DN-DETR has a hyper-parameter λ𝜆\lambda to control the noise scale. The generated noises are no larger than λ𝜆\lambda as DN-DETR wants the model to reconstruct the ground truth (GT) from moderately noised queries. In our method, we have two hyper-parameters λ1subscript𝜆1\lambda_{1} and λ2subscript𝜆2\lambda_{2}, where λ1<λ2subscript𝜆1subscript𝜆2\lambda_{1}<\lambda_{2}. As shown in the concentric squares in Fig. 3, we generate two types of CDN queries: positive queries and negative queries. Positive queries within the inner square have a noise scale smaller than λ1subscript𝜆1\lambda_{1} and are expected to reconstruct their corresponding ground truth boxes. Negative queries between the inner and outer squares have a noise scale larger than λ1subscript𝜆1\lambda_{1} and smaller than λ2subscript𝜆2\lambda_{2}. They are are expected to predict “no object”. We usually adopt small λ2subscript𝜆2\lambda_{2} because hard negative samples closer to GT boxes are more helpful to improve the performance. As shown in Fig. 3, each CDN group has a set of positive queries and negative queries. If an image has n𝑛n GT boxes, a CDN group will have 2×n2𝑛2\times n queries with each GT box generating a positive and a negative queries. Similar to DN-DETR, we also use multiple CDN groups to improve the effectiveness of our method. The reconstruction losses are l1subscript𝑙1l_{1} and GIOU losses for box regression and focal loss [19] for classification. The loss to classify negative samples as background is also focal loss.
items.zh: 实现：DN-DETR 有一个超参数 λ 来控制噪声尺度。生成的噪声不大于 λ，因为 DN-DETR 希望模型从适度噪声的查询中重建 GT。在我们的方法中，我们有两个超参数 λ1 和 λ2，其中 λ1 < λ2。如图 3 中的同心正方形所示，我们生成两种类型的 CDN 查询：正查询和负查询。内正方形内的正查询的噪声尺度小于 λ1，并且期望重建其对应的 GT 框。内正方形和外正方形之间的负查询的噪声尺度大于 λ1 且小于 λ2。它们期望预测“无物体”。我们通常采用较小的 λ2，因为更接近 GT 框的难负样本更有助于提高性能。如图 3 所示，每个 CDN 组有一组正查询和负查询。如果一张图像有 n 个 GT 框，则一个 CDN 组将有 2×n 个查询，每个 GT 框生成一个正查询和一个负查询。与 DN-DETR 类似，我们也使用多个 CDN 组来提高我们方法的有效性。重建损失是用于框回归的 l1 和 GIOU 损失，以及用于分类的 Focal 损失 [19]。将负样本分类为背景的损失也是 Focal 损失。

items.en: Analysis: The reason why our method works is that it can inhibit confusion and select high-quality anchors (queries) for predicting bounding boxes. The confusion happens when multiple anchors are close to one object. In this case, it is hard for the model to decide which anchor to choose. The confusion may lead to two problems. The first is duplicate predictions. Although DETR-like models can inhibit duplicate boxes with the help of set-based loss and self-attention [3], this ability is limited. As shown in the left figure of Fig. 8, when replacing our CDN queries with DN queries, the boy pointed by the arrow has 333 duplicate predictions. With CDN queries, our model can distinguish the slight difference between anchors and avoid duplicate predictions as shown in the right figure of Fig. 8. The second problem is that an unwanted anchor farther from a GT box might be selected. Although denoising training [17] has improved the model to choose nearby anchors, CDN further improves this capability by teaching the model to reject farther anchors.
items.zh: 分析：我们的方法有效的原因在于它可以抑制混淆并选择高质量的锚框（查询）来预测边界框。当多个锚框靠近一个物体时，就会发生混淆。在这种情况下，模型很难决定选择哪个锚框。混淆可能导致两个问题。第一个是重复预测。尽管类似 DETR 的模型可以借助基于集合的损失和自注意力 [3] 来抑制重复框，但这种能力是有限的。如图 8 左图所示，当用我们的 CDN 查询替换 DN 查询时，箭头所指的男孩有 3 个重复预测。使用 CDN 查询，我们的模型可以区分锚框之间的细微差异并避免重复预测，如图 8 右图所示。第二个问题是可能选择离 GT 框更远的无用锚框。尽管去噪训练 [17] 已经改进了模型以选择附近的锚框，但 CDN 通过教导模型拒绝更远的锚框进一步提高了这种能力。

items.en: Effectiveness: To demonstrate the effectiveness of CDN, we define a metric called Average Top-K Distance (ATD(k𝑘k)) and use it to evaluate how far anchors are from their target GT boxes in the matching part. As in DETR, each anchor corresponds to a prediction which may be matched with a GT box or background. We only consider those matched with GT boxes here. Assume we have N𝑁N GT bounding boxes b0,b2,…,bN−1subscript𝑏0subscript𝑏2…subscript𝑏𝑁1{b_{0},b_{2},...,b_{N-1}} in a validation set, where bi=(xi,yi,wi,hi)subscript𝑏𝑖subscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑖subscript𝑤𝑖subscriptℎ𝑖b_{i}=(x_{i},y_{i},w_{i},h_{i}). For each bisubscript𝑏𝑖b_{i}, we can find its corresponding anchor and denote it as ai=(xi′,yi′,wi′,hi′)subscript𝑎𝑖subscriptsuperscript𝑥′𝑖subscriptsuperscript𝑦′𝑖subscriptsuperscript𝑤′𝑖subscriptsuperscriptℎ′𝑖a_{i}=(x^{\prime}_{i},y^{\prime}_{i},w^{\prime}_{i},h^{\prime}_{i}). aisubscript𝑎𝑖a_{i} is the initial anchor box of the decoder whose refined box after the last decoder layer is assigned to bisubscript𝑏𝑖b_{i} during matching. Then we have
items.zh: 有效性：为了证明 CDN 的有效性，我们定义了一个称为平均 Top-K 距离（ATD(k)）的指标，并用它来评估在匹配部分中锚框与其目标 GT 框之间的距离。与 DETR 一样，每个锚框对应一个预测，该预测可能与 GT 框或背景匹配。我们这里只考虑与 GT 框匹配的那些。假设验证集中有 N 个 GT 边界框 b0, b2, ..., bN-1，其中 bi = (xi, yi, wi, hi)。对于每个 bi，我们可以找到其对应的锚框，并将其记为 ai = (x'i, y'i, w'i, h'i)。ai 是解码器的初始锚框，其经过最后一个解码器层细化后的框在匹配过程中被分配给 bi。然后我们有

items.en: where ∥bi−ai∥1subscriptdelimited-∥∥subscript𝑏𝑖subscript𝑎𝑖1\lVert b_{i}-a_{i}\rVert_{1} is the l1subscript𝑙1l_{1} distance between bisubscript𝑏𝑖b_{i} and aisubscript𝑎𝑖a_{i} and t​o​p​K(𝐱,k)𝑡𝑜𝑝𝐾𝐱𝑘\mathop{topK}(\mathbf{x},k) is a function that returns the set of k𝑘k largest elements in 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}. The reason why we select the top-K elements is that the confusion problem is more likely to happen when the GT box is matched with a farther anchor. As shown in (a) and (b) of Fig. 4, DN is good enough for selecting a good anchor overall. However, CDN finds better anchors for small objects. Fig. 4 (c) shows that CDN queries lead to an improvement of +1.31.3+1.3 AP over DN queries on small objects in 121212 epochs with ResNet-50 and multi-scale features.

items.capZh: 图 4：(a) 和 (b) 分别是所有物体和小物体上的 ATD(100)。(c) 小物体上的 AP。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Comparison of three different query initialization methods. The term “static” means that they will keep the same for different images in inference. A common implementation for these static queries is to make them learnable.
items.capZh: 图 5：三种不同查询初始化方法的比较。术语“静态”意味着它们在推理时对不同图像保持不变。这些静态查询的常见实现是使其可学习。

items.en: In DETR [3] and DN-DETR [17], decoder queries are static embeddings without taking any encoder features from an individual image, as shown in Fig. 5 (a). They learn anchors (in DN-DETR and DAB-DETR) or positional queries (in DETR) from training data directly and set the content queries as all 00 vectors. Deformable DETR [41] learns both the positional and content queries, which is another implementation of static query initialization. To further improve the performance, Deformable DETR [41] has a query selection variant (called ”two-stage” in [41]), which select top K encoder features from the last encoder layer as priors to enhance decoder queries. As shown in Fig. 5 (b), both the positional and content queries are generated by a linear transform of the selected features. In addition, these selected features are fed to an auxiliary detection head to get predicted boxes, which are used to initialize reference boxes. Similarly, Efficient DETR [39] also selects top K features based on the objectiveness (class) score of each encoder feature.
items.zh: 在 DETR [3] 和 DN-DETR [17] 中，解码器查询是静态嵌入，不采用来自单个图像的编码器特征，如图 5 (a) 所示。它们直接从训练数据中学习锚框（在 DN-DETR 和 DAB-DETR 中）或位置查询（在 DETR 中），并将内容查询设置为全 0 向量。Deformable DETR [41] 学习位置查询和内容查询，这是静态查询初始化的另一种实现。为了进一步提高性能，Deformable DETR [41] 有一个查询选择变体（在 [41] 中称为“两阶段”），它从最后一个编码器层选择 top-K 编码器特征作为先验来增强解码器查询。如图 5 (b) 所示，位置查询和内容查询都由所选特征的线性变换生成。此外，这些所选特征被馈送到辅助检测头以获得预测框，用于初始化参考框。类似地，Efficient DETR [39] 也基于每个编码器特征的目标性（类别）分数选择 top-K 特征。

items.en: The dynamic 444D anchor box formulation of queries in our model makes it closely related to decoder positional queries, which can be improved by query selection. We follow the above practice and propose a mixed query selection approach. As shown in Fig. 5 (c), we only initialize anchor boxes using the position information associated with the selected top-K features, but leave the content queries static as before. Note that Deformable DETR [41] utilizes the top-K features to enhance not only the positional queries but also the content queries. As the selected features are preliminary content features without further refinement, they could be ambiguous and misleading to the decoder. For example, a selected feature may contain multiple objects or be only part of an object. In contrast, our mixed query selection approach only enhances the positional queries with top-K selected features and keeps the content queries learnable as before. It helps the model to use better positional information to pool more comprehensive content features from the encoder.
items.zh: 我们模型中查询的动态 4D 锚框公式使其与解码器位置查询密切相关，可以通过查询选择来改进。我们遵循上述实践，提出了一种混合查询选择方法。如图 5 (c) 所示，我们仅使用与所选 top-K 特征相关的位置信息来初始化锚框，但保持内容查询与之前一样是静态的。注意，Deformable DETR [41] 利用 top-K 特征来增强位置查询和内容查询。由于所选特征是初步的内容特征，没有进一步细化，它们可能对解码器产生歧义和误导。例如，一个所选特征可能包含多个物体或仅是物体的一部分。相比之下，我们的混合查询选择方法仅使用 top-K 所选特征增强位置查询，并保持内容查询与之前一样可学习。这有助于模型使用更好的位置信息从编码器中汇集更全面的内容特征。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Comparison of box update in Deformable DETR and our method.
items.capZh: 图 6：Deformable DETR 和我们的方法中框更新的比较。

items.en: We propose a new way to box prediction in this section. The iterative box refinement in Deformable DETR [41] blocks gradient back propagation to stabilize training. We name the method look forward once since the parameters of layer i𝑖i are updated based on the auxiliary loss of boxes bisubscript𝑏𝑖b_{i} only, as shown in Fig. 6 (a). However, we conjecture that the improved box information from a later layer could be more helpful to correct the box prediction in its adjacent early layer. Hence we propose another way called look forward twice to perform box update, where the parameters of layer-i𝑖i are influenced by losses of both layer-i𝑖i and layer-(i+1)𝑖1(i+1), as shown in Fig. 6 (b). For each predicted offset Δ​biΔsubscript𝑏𝑖\Delta b_{i}, it will be used to update box twice, one for bi′superscriptsubscript𝑏𝑖′b_{i}^{\prime} and another for bi+1(p​r​e​d)superscriptsubscript𝑏𝑖1𝑝𝑟𝑒𝑑b_{i+1}^{(pred)}, hence we name our method as look forward twice.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们提出了一种新的框预测方式。Deformable DETR [41] 中的迭代框细化会阻止梯度反向传播以稳定训练。我们将该方法称为一次前向，因为第 i 层的参数仅基于框 bi 的辅助损失进行更新，如图 6 (a) 所示。然而，我们推测来自后层的改进框信息可能更有助于纠正其相邻前层的框预测。因此，我们提出了另一种称为两次前向的方法来执行框更新，其中第 i 层的参数受到第 i 层和第 (i+1) 层损失的影响，如图 6 (b) 所示。对于每个预测的偏移 Δbi，它将用于两次更新框，一次用于 b'i，另一次用于 b(pred)i+1，因此我们将我们的方法命名为两次前向。

items.en: The final precision of a predicted box bi(pred)superscriptsubscript𝑏𝑖predb_{i}^{(\mathrm{pred})} is determined by two factors: the quality of the initial box bi−1subscript𝑏𝑖1b_{i-1} and the predicted offset of the box Δ​biΔsubscript𝑏𝑖\Delta b_{i}. The look forward once scheme optimizes the latter only, as the gradient information is detached from layer-i𝑖i to layer-(i−1)𝑖1(i-1). In contrast, we improve both the initial box bi−1subscript𝑏𝑖1b_{i-1} and the predicted box offset Δ​biΔsubscript𝑏𝑖\Delta b_{i}. A simple way to improving the quality is supervising the final box bi′superscriptsubscript𝑏𝑖′b_{i}^{\prime} of layer i𝑖i with the output of the next layer Δ​bi+1Δsubscript𝑏𝑖1\Delta b_{i+1}. Hence we use the sum of bi′superscriptsubscript𝑏𝑖′b_{i}^{\prime} and Δ​bi+1Δsubscript𝑏𝑖1\Delta b_{i+1} as the predicted box of layer-(i+1)𝑖1(i+1).
items.zh: 预测框 b(pred)i 的最终精度由两个因素决定：初始框 bi-1 的质量和框的预测偏移 Δbi。一次前向方案仅优化后者，因为梯度信息从第 i 层分离到第 (i-1) 层。相比之下，我们同时改进了初始框 bi-1 和预测框偏移 Δbi。提高质量的一种简单方法是使用下一层的输出 Δbi+1 来监督第 i 层的最终框 b'i。因此，我们使用 b'i 和 Δbi+1 的和作为第 (i+1) 层的预测框。

items.en: More specifically, given an input box bi−1subscript𝑏𝑖1b_{i-1} for the i𝑖i-th layer, we obtain the final prediction box bi(pred)superscriptsubscript𝑏𝑖predb_{i}^{(\mathrm{pred})} by:
items.zh: 更具体地说，给定第 i 层的输入框 bi-1，我们通过以下方式获得最终预测框 b(pred)i：

items.en: where bi′superscriptsubscript𝑏𝑖′b_{i}^{\prime} is the undetached version of bisubscript𝑏𝑖b_{i}. The term Update​(⋅,⋅)Update⋅⋅\mathrm{Update}(\cdot,\cdot) is a function that refines the box bi−1subscript𝑏𝑖1b_{i-1} by the predicted box offset Δ​biΔsubscript𝑏𝑖\Delta b_{i}. We adopt the same way for box update333We use normalized forms of boxes in our model, hence each value of a box is a float between 00 and 111. Given two boxes, we sum them after inverse sigmoid and then transform the summation by sigmoid. Refer to Deformable DETR [41] Sec. A.3 for more details. as in Deformable DETR [41].
items.zh: 其中 b'i 是 bi 的未分离版本。函数 Update(·,·) 通过预测的框偏移 Δbi 来细化框 bi-1。我们采用与 Deformable DETR [41] 中相同的框更新方式（我们在模型中使用归一化的框形式，因此框的每个值都是 0 到 1 之间的浮点数。给定两个框，我们在反 sigmoid 后求和，然后通过 sigmoid 变换求和。更多细节请参考 Deformable DETR [41] 第 A.3 节）。

items.en: Dataset and Backbone: We conduct evaluation on the COCO 2017 object detection dataset [20], which is split into train2017 and val2017 (also called minival). We report results with two different backbones: ResNet-50 [14] pre-trained on ImageNet-1k [9] and SwinL [23] pre-trained on ImageNet-22k [9]. DINO with ResNet-50 is trained on train2017 without extra data, while DINO with SwinL is first pre-trained on Object365 [33] and then fine-tuned on train2017. We report the standard average precision (AP) result on val2017 under different IoU thresholds and object scales. We also report the test-dev results for DINO with SwinL. Implementation Details: DINO is composed of a backbone, a Transformer encoder, a Transformer decoder, and multiple prediction heads. In appendix 0.D, we provide more implementation details, including all the hyper-parameters and engineering techniques used in our models for those who want to reproduce our results. We will release the code after the blind review.
items.zh: 数据集和主干网络：我们在 COCO 2017 目标检测数据集 [20] 上进行评估，该数据集分为 train2017 和 val2017（也称为 minival）。我们报告了两种不同主干网络的结果：在 ImageNet-1k [9] 上预训练的 ResNet-50 [14] 和在 ImageNet-22k [9] 上预训练的 SwinL [23]。使用 ResNet-50 的 DINO 在 train2017 上训练，没有额外数据，而使用 SwinL 的 DINO 首先在 Object365 [33] 上预训练，然后在 train2017 上微调。我们报告了 val2017 上在不同 IoU 阈值和物体尺度下的标准平均精度（AP）结果。我们还报告了使用 SwinL 的 DINO 的 test-dev 结果。实现细节：DINO 由主干网络、Transformer 编码器、Transformer 解码器和多个预测头组成。在附录 0.D 中，我们提供了更多实现细节，包括我们模型中使用的所有超参数和工程技巧，供希望重现我们结果的人使用。我们将在盲审后发布代码。

items.en: 12-epoch setting: With our improved anchor box denoising and training losses, the training process can be significantly accelerated. As shown in Table 1, we compare our method with strong baselines including both convolution-based methods [30, 4, 7] and DETR-like methods [3, 41, 8, 21, 17]. For a fair comparison, we report both GFLOPS and FPS tested on the same A100 NVIDIA GPU for all the models listed in Table 1. All methods except for DETR and DAB-DETR use multi-scale features. For those without multi-scale features, we report their results with ResNet-DC5 which has a better performance for its use of a dilated larger resolution feature map. Since some methods adopt 555 scales of feature maps and some adopt 444, we report our results with both 444 and 555 scales of feature maps.
items.zh: 12-epoch 设置：通过我们改进的锚框去噪和训练损失，训练过程可以显著加速。如表 1 所示，我们将我们的方法与强基线进行了比较，包括基于卷积的方法 [30, 4, 7] 和类似 DETR 的方法 [3, 41, 8, 21, 17]。为了公平比较，我们报告了表 1 中所有模型在同一 A100 NVIDIA GPU 上测试的 GFLOPS 和 FPS。除 DETR 和 DAB-DETR 外，所有方法都使用多尺度特征。对于没有多尺度特征的方法，我们报告了它们使用 ResNet-DC5 的结果，该结果由于使用了膨胀的更大分辨率特征图而具有更好的性能。由于一些方法采用 5 尺度特征图，一些采用 4 尺度，我们报告了我们在 4 和 5 尺度特征图下的结果。

items.en: As shown in Table 1, our method yields an improvement of +5.65.6+5.6 AP under the same setting using ResNet-50 with 444-scale feature maps and +6.06.0+6.0 AP with 555-scale feature maps. Our 444-scale model does not introduce much overhead in computation and the number of parameters. Moreover, our method performs especially well for small objects, gaining +7.27.2+7.2 AP with 444 scales and +7.57.5+7.5 AP with 555 scales. Note that the results of our models with ResNet-50 backbone are higher than those in the first version of our paper due to engineering techniques. Comparison with the best models with a ResNet-50 backbone:
items.zh: 如表1所示，在相同设置下，使用ResNet-50和4尺度特征图时，我们的方法提升了+5.6 AP；使用5尺度特征图时提升了+6.0 AP。我们的4尺度模型在计算量和参数量上没有引入太多开销。此外，我们的方法对小物体表现尤其好，在4尺度下获得+7.2 AP，在5尺度下获得+7.5 AP。注意，由于工程技巧，我们使用ResNet-50骨干网络的结果比论文初版中的结果更高。与使用ResNet-50骨干网络的最佳模型比较：

items.capEn: Figure 7: Training convergence curves evaluated on COCO val2017 for DINO and two previous state-of-the-art models with ResNet-50 using multi-scale features.
items.capZh: 图7：在COCO val2017上评估的DINO与两个先前最先进模型（使用ResNet-50和多尺度特征）的训练收敛曲线。

items.en: To validate the effectiveness of our method in improving both convergence speed and performance, we compare our method with several strong baselines using the same ResNet-50 backbone. Despite the most common 505050-epoch setting, we adopt the 242424 (2×2\times) and 363636 (3×3\times) epoch settings since our method converges faster and yields only a smaller additional gain with 505050-epoch training. The results in Table 2 show that, using only 242424 epochs, our method achieves an improvement of +1.81.8+1.8 AP and +2.72.7+2.7 AP with 444 and 555 scales, respectively. Moreover, using 363636 epochs in the 3×3\times setting, the improvement increases to +2.32.3+2.3 and +2.62.6+2.6 AP with 444 and 555 scales, respectively. The detailed convergence curve comparison is shown in Fig. 7.
items.zh: 为了验证我们的方法在提高收敛速度和性能方面的有效性，我们使用相同的ResNet-50骨干网络与几个强基线进行比较。尽管最常见的设置是50个epoch，但我们采用了24（2×）和36（3×）个epoch的设置，因为我们的方法收敛更快，且使用50个epoch训练时仅获得较小的额外增益。表2的结果显示，仅使用24个epoch，我们的方法在4尺度和5尺度下分别提升了+1.8 AP和+2.7 AP。此外，在3×设置下使用36个epoch时，提升增加到4尺度下的+2.3 AP和5尺度下的+2.6 AP。详细的收敛曲线比较如图7所示。

items.en: To compare with SOTA results, we use the publicly available SwinL [23] backbone pre-trained on ImageNet-22K. We first pre-train DINO on the Objects365 [33] dataset and then fine-tune it on COCO. As shown in Table 3, DINO achieves the best results of 63.263.263.2AP and 63.363.363.3AP on COCO val2017 and test-dev, which demonstrate its strong scalability to larger model size and data size. Note that all the previous SOTA models in Table 3 do not use Transformer decoder-based detection heads (HTC++ [4] and DyHead [7]). It is the first time that an end-to-end Transformer detector is established as a SOTA model on the leaderboard [1]. Compared with the previous SOTA models, we use a much smaller model size (1/151151/15 parameters compared with SwinV2-G [22]), backbone pre-training data size (1/601601/60 images compared with Florence), and detection pre-training data size (1/5151/5 images compared with Florence), while achieving better results. In addition, our reported performance without test time augmentation (TTA) is a neat result without bells and whistles. These results effectively show the superior detection performance of DINO compared with traditional detectors.
items.zh: 为了与SOTA结果比较，我们使用在ImageNet-22K上预训练的公开SwinL [23]骨干网络。我们首先在Objects365 [33]数据集上预训练DINO，然后在COCO上微调。如表3所示，DINO在COCO val2017和test-dev上分别取得了63.2 AP和63.3 AP的最佳结果，展示了其对更大模型尺寸和数据尺寸的强可扩展性。注意，表3中所有先前的SOTA模型均未使用基于Transformer解码器的检测头（HTC++ [4]和DyHead [7]）。这是端到端Transformer检测器首次在排行榜上成为SOTA模型[1]。与先前的SOTA模型相比，我们使用了更小的模型尺寸（参数量为SwinV2-G [22]的1/15）、更小的骨干预训练数据量（图像数为Florence的1/60）和更小的检测预训练数据量（图像数为Florence的1/5），同时取得了更好的结果。此外，我们报告的无测试时增强（TTA）性能是简洁的结果，没有花哨的技巧。这些结果有效展示了DINO相比传统检测器的优越检测性能。

items.en: Effectiveness of New Algorithm Components: To validate the effectiveness of our proposed methods, we build a strong baseline with optimized DN-DETR and pure query selection as described in section 3.1. We include all the pipeline optimization and engineering techniques (see section 4.1 and Appendix 0.D) in the strong baseline. The result of the strong baseline is available in Table 4 Row 3. We also present the result of optimized DN-DETR without pure query selection from Deformable DETR [41] in Table 4 Row 2. While our strong baseline outperforms all previous models, our three new methods in DINO further improve the performance significantly.
items.zh: 新算法组件的有效性：为了验证我们提出方法的有效性，我们构建了一个强基线，包含优化的DN-DETR和如3.1节所述的纯查询选择。我们将所有流程优化和工程技巧（见4.1节和附录0.D）纳入强基线。强基线的结果见表4第3行。我们还展示了来自Deformable DETR [41]的优化DN-DETR（不含纯查询选择）的结果，见表4第2行。虽然我们的强基线已经超越了所有先前模型，但DINO中的三个新方法进一步显著提升了性能。

items.en: In this paper, we have presented a strong end-to-end Transformer detector DINO with contrastive denoising training, mixed query selection, and look forward twice, which significantly improves both the training efficiency and the final detection performance. As a result, DINO outperforms all previous ResNet-50-based models on COCO val2017 in both the 121212-epoch and the 363636-epoch settings using multi-scale features. Motivated by the improvement, we further explored to train DINO with a stronger backbone on a larger dataset and achieved a new state of the art, 63.363.363.3 AP on COCO 2017 test-dev. This result establishes DETR-like models as a mainstream detection framework, not only for its novel end-to-end detection optimization, but also for its superior performance.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个强大的端到端Transformer检测器DINO，包含对比去噪训练、混合查询选择和两次前瞻，显著提高了训练效率和最终检测性能。因此，DINO在使用多尺度特征的COCO val2017上，在12个epoch和36个epoch设置下均超越了所有先前基于ResNet-50的模型。受此改进的激励，我们进一步探索在更大数据集上使用更强骨干网络训练DINO，并在COCO 2017 test-dev上取得了新的最先进结果63.3 AP。这一结果确立了类似DETR的模型作为主流检测框架的地位，不仅因为其新颖的端到端检测优化，还因为其优越的性能。
